name: clickhouse-data-handling
description: Handle data lifecycle in ClickHouse — TTL expiration, data deletion (GDPR), column-level encryption, and audit logging with real ClickHouse SQL. Use when implementing data retention, GDPR deletion requests, or managing sensitive data in ClickHouse. Trigger: "clickhouse data retention", "clickhouse TTL", "clickhouse GDPR", "delete data clickhouse", "clickhouse data lifecycle", "clickhouse PII".
